name: Mississippi Mud Bars/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and line an 8 or 9 inch square baking pan with foil. Set aside.
3. Beat together butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add egg and vanilla; mix well.
4. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix until combined.
5. Fold in half the chopped semi-sweet and white chocolate. Stir in half the walnuts.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and sprinkle with remaining semi-sweet and white chocolate, covering the surface to let melt slightly.
8. Swirl chocolates together with a knife to create a marbled effect.
9. Sprinkle with remaining walnuts.
10. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into bars.
